test.name: File Upload

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b3a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b789d916] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78e8313] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b791fe92] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b791a011] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b79192c3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7866565] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b56785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b5facc+3a88c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b786532a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7f94b48+46f908] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b3a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b789db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7888ca2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78af416] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b79270e0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7943482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78e9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78ea183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b56785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b5facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b43634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b437e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b27e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Normalize Path
kw.doc: Normalizes the given path.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b3a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b789db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7888ca2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78af416] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b79270e0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7943482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78e9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78ea183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b56785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b5facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b43634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b437e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b27e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

test.name: File Download

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b3a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b789db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7874322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7926e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b7943482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78e9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7b78ea183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7e59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b56785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b5facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b43634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b437e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7b7b27e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff818d5e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff81a90c48c+2c]

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Created
kw.doc: Waits until the given file or directory is created.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
